title: SuperOreBlock
description: SuperOreBlocks introduces a new way to store and manage your valuable resources more efficiently in Minecraft.
body:
![Banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/SuperOreBlock/BH_SuperOreBlock_header.webp) Too many ores? Overwhelmed by iron or gold farms? This mod is here to help! SuperOreBlocks introduces a new way to store and manage your valuable resources more efficiently in Minecraft. You can also use these blocks to craft new items, with the **[Exclusive Weapons, Armor and Tools](https://modrinth.com/mod/exclusive-weapons-armor-and-tools)** mod. ### Do you need a server to play with your friends?

For exceptional server hosting services, look no further than **[BisectHosting](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin)**. Of course, you can install all the mods or modpacks you want, and their support team is always available to help you. **[With the code "Lupin" you will get a 25% discount! Click here!](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin)** ![Summary](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/SuperOreBlock/BH_SuperOreBlock_description.webp) New Super Blocks for the following ores: - Coal - Copper - Iron - Gold - Lapis Lazuli - Redstone - Emerald - Diamond - Netherite Simple crafting: Combine 4 regular ore blocks to create a Super Block of that ore. Smart storage: Great for saving inventory space or organizing output from auto-farms and mining sessions. Reversible crafting: You can convert any Super Block back into 4 standard ore blocks at any time. ![FAQ](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/SuperOreBlock/BH_SuperOreBlock_faq.webp) ### Does it work on servers? ### Sure! Remember that the best way to play with mods and friends is with BisectHosting, and by **[clicking on this link you can get a 25% discount](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin).** ### Can this mod be used in modpacks? ### Of course! As long as it is published only on Modrinth or CurseForge. Uploading it to any other platform would be violating our rights and is not allowed at all. However, we are really grateful if you consider adding it to your Modrinth or CurseForge modpack. If you need any small changes or have any questions, contact us! ![Screenshots](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/SuperOreBlock/BH_SuperOreBlock_screenshots.webp) ![Screenshots 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/lFr5Bbfo/images/e37a44100e42c44d9feb167f4dabb4cfc011cbd4.png) ![Screenshots 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/lFr5Bbfo/images/5cc1d38eaca8343a500249cdf805a3006f00e2d0.png) ![Screenshots 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/lFr5Bbfo/images/cb2bee4b238a0ce585c7e9811a780cf6dc4e923c.png) [![DISCORD](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/MultiRecipe/BH_Lupin_Discord.webp)](https://discord.gg/X8VY5WMbe4) .
